description_long: This object is a stylized model of an airplane mounted on a coiled spring stand, resembling a whimsical playground ride or decorative piece. The airplane features a rounded fuselage with a blunt nose, a single propeller at the front, and two short, straight wings extending from the midsection. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, with a small, pointed tail cone. The landing gear consists of two stubby, fixed wheels positioned under the wings, and the cockpit is represented by a simple, forward-facing opening. The entire object is rendered in a uniform, matte dark color, giving it a playful and cartoonish appearance.
description: A stylized, cartoon-like airplane with a propeller, mounted on a spring stand, featuring short wings and a simple cockpit opening.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the tail, single vertical stabilizer, and the spring stand attachment.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, rounded nose, cockpit opening, and symmetrical wing placement.
description_view_2: Side three-quarter view displaying the wing profile, landing gear, and the spring base connection.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the wing span, fuselage shape, and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight, short wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted propeller (piston engine implied by propeller presence).
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open cockpit represented by a simple opening at the front of the fuselage.
